# RingCentral Professional Services

## About RingCentral Professional Services

RingCentral Professional Services offers a turnkey package for organizations that want a fully supported, RingCentral-built integration between their CRM and App Connect. Rather than building in-house or managing a third-party relationship, you get a single vendor who understands both the RingEX platform and the App Connect framework at the deepest level.

Whether your CRM is a widely-used SaaS product or a proprietary internal system, Professional Services has the expertise to scope, build, and maintain a connector that meets your requirements.

## What's included

**Expert team.** RingCentral Professional Services are the original authors of App Connect, with a proven track record of delivering integrations for a wide range of CRMs.

**Single billing relationship.** One invoice, one vendor, one support contact. No need to coordinate between multiple parties.

**Rapid delivery.** Most integrations are scoped and delivered within 1–3 weeks, depending on your CRM and the complexity of its APIs.

**Ongoing maintenance and support.** Professional Services keeps your connector current as App Connect evolves, so you're never left behind by a platform update.

**Compatibility assessment.** Not sure if your CRM is compatible? Professional Services will evaluate your platform's APIs before any commitment is required.

## Get started

Book a free consultation to discuss your CRM, understand what's involved, and get a quote.
